title: Search for 'men' displays women's items in results
context: E-commerce platform with product search functionality
steps: Open the Home page: [hidden due to confidentiality]
Click on the Search icon (magnifying glass)
actual: The search results include women's items which are irrelevant to the query.
expected: Search results should include only men's items.
comments: The same issue appears on different pages.
note: Due to confidentiality and NDA restrictions, original video evidence cannot be shared.

title: Link [learn about strategies] incorrectly redirects to "Market Analysis" page in FAQ accordion on "Trading essentials" page
context: Online trading platform (CFD and Forex) with educational content and FAQ sections
steps: Click on Accordion item "How to start trading for beginners"
actual: The link [learn about strategies] is redirected to the page "Market Analysis"
expected: The link [learn about strategies] is redirected to the page "Trading strategies"
comments: Repeated issue when ASIC, FCA, SCA, SCB or CYSEC license and EN, AR, DE, ES, FR, RU,ZH(Traditional), ZH(Simplified), PL, HU, IT, or NL language are selected.
note: No video available due to NDA

title: Anchor link [Learn more about us] doesn't redirect to the block "Learn more about us" in the block "Contents" on the page "Client funds"
context: Online trading platform (CFD and Forex) with educational content and FAQ sections
steps: Click the menu item [Client funds] in menu title [About us]
Click the anchor link [Learn more about us]
actual: Anchor link [Learn more about us] doesn't redirect to the block "Learn more about us"
expected: Anchor link [Learn more about us] redirects to the block "Learn more about us"
comments: Issue is reproducible when all users rolls are selected - authorized, unauthorized, unregistered, and only when FCA licence and EN language are selected
note: No video available due to NDA

title: The "Contents" block is missing on the "Client funds" page under specific license and language combinations
context: Online trading platform (CFD and Forex) with educational content and FAQ sections
steps: Click the menu item [Client funds] in menu title [About us]
Pay attention to the right side of the page
actual: The block "Contents" is not displayed on the page
expected: The "Contents" block is displayed on the right side of the page, providing navigation links
comments: Issue is reproducible when all users rolls are selected - authorized, unauthorized, unregistered and when SCA, ASIC  license and any language are selected, or CySEC license and any language (except  EN and ES languages) are selected
note: No video available due to NDA

title: The anchor link [FAQs] is not redirected to the block "FAQs" on the page "Trading essentials"
context: Online trading platform (CFD and Forex) with educational content and FAQ sections
steps: Click the menu item [Trading Essentials] in menu title [For trading beginners]
Click the anchor link [FAQs] in block "Contents"
actual: The anchor link [FAQs] is not redirected to the block "FAQs"(it redirects to block "Risks and benefits of trading" instead)
expected: The anchor link [FAQs]  is redirected to the block "FAQs"
comments: Issue is reproducible when all users rolls are selected - authorized, unauthorized, unregistered and also when SCB, ASIC, FCA, or SCA license and any language are selected
note: No video available due to NDA

title: Typo "Lea" in cryptocurrency trading link on "Kryptowaluty" page (PL/CYSEC)
context: Online trading platform (CFD and Forex) with educational content and FAQ sections
steps: Click the menu item [Kryptowaluty](Cryptocurrencies) in menu title [Nasze rynki](Our markets)
Scroll down to the block "Dlaczego warto handlować kryptowalutami z Capital.com?"(Why trade cryptocurrencies with Capital.com ?)
actual: The link  [LeaDowiedz się więcej o handlu kryptowalutami] is displayed
expected: The link [Dowiedz się więcej o handlu kryptowalutami] is displayed
comments: Reproducible across all user roles (authorized/unauthorized/unregistered) but specific to CYSEC/PL context
note: No video available due to NDA

title: Link [forex trading] is not translated on "Niezbędnik handlu" page (PL/CYSEC)
context: Online trading platform (CFD and Forex) with educational content and FAQ sections
steps: Click the menu item [Niezbędnik handlu] (Trading essentials)
Scroll down to the list item number 3 in the block "Rynki finansowe dla nowych traderów" (Financial markets for new traders)
Pay attention to the link [forex trading]
actual: The link [forex trading] is not translated into PL language
expected: The link text is translated into Polish (e.g., [handel forex])
comments: Reproducible across all user roles (authorized/unauthorized/unregistered) but specific to CYSEC/PL context
note: No video available due to NDA

title: Identical price filter (Min 50, Max 50) returns no results in Search
context: E-commerce platform with product search functionality
steps: Open the Home page: [hidden due to confidentiality]
Click on the Search icon and enter a keyword with multiple results (e.g., "shoes")
Enter "50" in the Min price field and "50" in the Max price field on the right side panel
actual: The system fails to show any products matching that specific price, despite valid products costing exactly $50.00 being present in the list before the filter was applied.
expected: The search results should display all products that match the exact price entered in the filter range ($50.00). Identical Min and Max values should be treated as a valid filter for a specific price point.
comments: The same issue appears when equal Min and Max price are selected.
note: Due to confidentiality and NDA restrictions, original video evidence cannot be shared.

title: AI Audio Generator ignores the duration constraint specified in the prompt within the Elements tab
context: Web-based design tool for creating graphics, presentations, and social media content,  also using AI
steps: Open the Home page: [hidden due to confidentiality]
Type 'Generate a 3-second long magic sparkle sound effect' text into the input field
actual: The AI generates a sound effect that does not match the duration requested in the prompt (e.g., the output is only 1 second long instead of 3), ignoring the explicit instructional constraint.
expected: The generated sound effect should strictly adhere to the duration specified in the prompt (e.g., it should be exactly 3 seconds long as requested)
comments: Consistently observed with different prompts: 2s, 5s, and 10s constraints all result in incorrect output duration.
note: Due to confidentiality and NDA restrictions, original video evidence cannot be shared.

title: AI Generator ignores requested page count (20) after style regeneration
context: Web-based design tool for creating graphics, presentations, and social media content,  also using AI
steps: Open the Home page: [hidden due to confidentiality]
Enter a detailed prompt requesting a specific number of pages (e.g., "Create a comprehensive 20-page technical presentation titled 'Advanced CSS'")
Once generated, change the Style Preset to a different one (e.g., 'Organic')
actual: After regenerating the presentation with a different style, the AI ignores the explicit "20-page" instruction from the prompt and produces a template with significantly fewer pages (e.g., only 14 pages instead of 20).
expected: The generated presentation is strictly adhere to the instructional constraints (page count) provided in the prompt, maintaining the requested 20 pages even after style regeneration.
comments: An issue appears only when regenerating with style changing. The AI consistently fails to maintain the original page count constraint only during the style-switch regeneration flow
note: Due to confidentiality and NDA restrictions, original video evidence cannot be shared.

title: AI Email Generator merges multiple requested small buttons into a single text element instead of separate interactive objects
context: Web-based design tool for creating graphics, presentations, and social media content,  also using AI
steps: Open the Home page: [hidden due to confidentiality]
Type "Generate a professional 'Thank You' email template with a large 'Watch Replay' button and two smaller buttons for 'Download PDF' and 'Visit Website' at the bottom" in to the input field
Inspect the elements at the bottom of the generated email layout
actual: The AI generator successfully creates the large button, but merges the two smaller buttons ("Download PDF" and "Visit Website") without proper button design. These elements do not appear as separate button objects, ignoring the specific instruction in the prompt. Instead, the 3rd button it created at the bottom of the page.
expected: The AI strictly follows the prompt instructions and generates three distinct, interactive button elements with defined labels. Each button (including the two smaller ones) is a separate, editable object with its own text label as requested, and no additional buttons are created on the page.
comments: Such behavior is observed with different prompted buttons' number (e.g.3, 4, 5)
note: Due to confidentiality and NDA restrictions, original video evidence cannot be shared.

title: AI Form Generator produces text placeholders instead of button objects and inserts irrelevant paragraph text into button labels
context: Web-based design tool for creating graphics, presentations, and social media content,  also using AI
steps: Open the Home page: [hidden due to confidentiality]
Enter the prompt: "Generate a feedback form for a coffee shop with fields for 'Name', 'Rating', and a prominent 'Send Feedback' button with a coffee cup icon next to the text" into the input field
Inspect the generated form and the button at the bottom
actual: The AI fails to generate the requested "Send Feedback" button with an icon. Instead, it displays a text placeholder in brackets: [Prominent 'Send Feedback' Button with Coffee Cup Icon]. Additionally, the button generated at the bottom of the layout contains a long paragraph of "Thank you" text instead of the requested short label.
expected: The AI generated an interactive, editable button object labeled "Send Feedback" with a coffee cup icon as specified in the prompt. No text placeholders or irrelevant long paragraphs is presented within the button elements
comments: Such behavior is observed with different prompted icons' designs
note: Due to confidentiality and NDA restrictions, original video evidence cannot be shared.

title: AI Generator incorrectly triggers search instead of content generation when prompts contain double quotes
context: Web-based design tool for creating graphics, presentations, and social media content,  also using AI
steps: Open the Home page: [hidden due to confidentiality]
Type a prompt that includes double quotes (e.g."Create a conference registration form with 5 mandatory text input fields and one 'Register' button.") into the input field
Select 'Forms' menu icon in drop-down menu
actual: The AI fails to initiate the generation process. Instead, it treats the prompt as a search query and displays a message, incorrectly switching from generation logic to search logic because of the double quotes in the text.
expected: The AI correctly parses the prompt regardless of the presence of double quotes and generates the requested elements based on the "Generate" button command
comments: Such behavior is observed with different prompts
note: Due to confidentiality and NDA restrictions, original video evidence cannot be shared.

title: AI 3D Model Generator ignores "transparent" attribute and fails to render clear internal objects
context: Web-based design tool for creating graphics, presentations, and social media content,  also using AI
steps: Open the Home page: [hidden due to confidentiality]
Open any design (e.g., Presentation) to access the Editor page
Navigate to the Elements menu icon on the left sidebar
Enter the prompt: "Generate a 3D model of a transparent cube with a red sphere inside."
Select '3D' menu item in drop-down menu
actual: The AI generates a solid, non-transparent white cube instead of a transparent one. Furthermore, the requested "red sphere" is rendered as a blurry, indistinct red shape inside the cube, failing to follow the specific visual and structural instructions of the prompt
expected: The AI is strictly adhering to all attributes provided in the prompt, generating a clearly transparent 3D cube that contains a well-defined, distinct red sphere inside it
comments: Such behavior is observed three times one by one
note: Due to confidentiality and NDA restrictions, original video evidence cannot be shared.
